programs.desc: Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
When Mary's best high school chum, a successful television psychologist, pays her a visit, Mary feels somewhat inadequate when compared with her celebrity friend.
The tenants are thrilled when Rose hires a live-in handyman for some much needed repairs, only to find he's handier with the violin than the toolbox.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Stricken with a toothache, Al reluctantly visits a dentist for the first time, leaving him in too much pain to enjoy the family meal that Peggy has begrudgingly agreed to prepare.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.sub_title: He Ain't Much But He's Mine
programs.desc: When a flashy blond at the beauty parlor brags about her affair with a married man, Peggy worries that Al is picking up more than a spare on his bowling night.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: The Bundys are elated over the extra income they receive when they house a foreign exchange student, but Kelly gets a run for her money when the student turns out to be a beautiful, sexy French girl.
